chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.379 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.6377/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.6378/2025 (withdrawal) ------------------------------------------ 08.05.2025 Mr. Jahanzeb Baloch, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Along with urgent application CMA No.6378/2025 has been moved for withdrawal of instant criminal miscellaneous application to avail the appropriate remedy available to the applicant under the law. Order accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
